title: fdv3.1 AWR IO Stats - Function And Filetype

list.description: Portal URL — set automatically from portal Settings → Access Control
list.label: Portal URL
list.name: portal_url

list.description: Grafana URL — set automatically from portal Settings → Access Control
list.label: Grafana URL
list.name: grafana_url
dbname
list.label: Database
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT dbname AS value, dbname AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT instance AS value, instance AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.name: start_snap
list.label: Start Snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

list.name: end_snap
list.label: End Snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

options.content: ⬅ Return to Navigation  |  , 🔄 Reset Filters

targets.rawSql:
WITH t AS (
  SELECT function_name, SUM(reads_mb) AS total_reads_mb
  FROM awr_iostat_function
  WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''  
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
  GROUP BY function_name
)
SELECT function_name as metric, total_reads_mb FROM t ORDER BY total_reads_mb DESC LIMIT 5;

WITH t AS (
  SELECT function_name, SUM(writes_mb) AS total_writes_mb
  FROM awr_iostat_function
  WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''  
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
  GROUP BY function_name
)
SELECT function_name AS metric, total_writes_mb FROM t ORDER BY total_writes_mb DESC LIMIT 5;

WITH topf AS (
SELECT function_name, SUM(reads_mb) AS total_reads_mb FROM awr_iostat_function
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != ''
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND function_name NOT LIKE 'total%'GROUP BY function_name
ORDER BY total_reads_mb DESC
LIMIT 5
)
SELECT f.snap_time AS time,
f.function_name,
AVG(f.reads_data_per_sec_mb) AS reads_mb_per_sec
FROM awr_iostat_function f
JOIN topf t ON f.function_name = t.function_name
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != ''
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND f.function_name NOT LIKE 'TOTAL'
GROUP BY f.snap_time, f.function_name
ORDER BY time;

WITH topf AS (
SELECT function_name, SUM(writes_mb) AS total_writes_mb
FROM awr_iostat_function
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != ''
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND function_name NOT LIKE 'TOTAL%'
GROUP BY function_name
ORDER BY total_writes_mb DESC
LIMIT 5
)
SELECT f.snap_time AS time,
f.function_name,
AVG(f.writes_data_per_sec_mb) AS writes_mb_per_sec
FROM awr_iostat_function f
JOIN topf t ON f.function_name = t.function_name
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != ''
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND f.function_name NOT LIKE 'TOTAL%'
GROUP BY f.snap_time, f.function_name
ORDER BY time;

SELECT filetype_name AS metric, SUM(reads_mb) AS total_reads_mb
FROM awr_iostat_filetype
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''  
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND filetype_name NOT LIKE 'TOTAL%'
GROUP BY filetype_name ORDER BY total_reads_mb DESC LIMIT 5;

SELECT snap_time AS time, function_file_name AS metric, (reads_mb + writes_mb) AS io_mb
FROM awr_iostat_func_filetype
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''  
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND function_file_name NOT LIKE 'TOTAL%'
ORDER BY time;

WITH fn AS (
SELECT
'FUNCTION' AS kind,
function_name AS name,
ROUND(AVG(reads_mb)) AS avg_reads_mb,
ROUND(AVG(reads_reqs_per_sec)) AS avg_reads_reqs,
ROUND(AVG(reads_data_per_sec_mb)) AS avg_reads_per_sec_mb,
ROUND(AVG(writes_mb)) AS avg_writes_mb,
ROUND(AVG(writes_reqs_per_sec)) AS avg_writes_reqs,
ROUND(AVG(writes_data_per_sec_mb)) AS avg_writes_per_sec_mb,
ROUND(AVG(waits)) AS avg_waits,
ROUND(AVG(avg_time_ms)) AS avg_time_ms
FROM awr_iostat_function
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != ''
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND function_name NOT ILIKE 'TOTAL%'    GROUP BY function_name
),
ft AS (
SELECT
'FILETYPE' AS kind,
filetype_name AS name,
ROUND(AVG(reads_mb), 2) AS avg_reads_mb,
ROUND(AVG(reads_reqs_per_sec), 2) AS avg_reads_reqs,
ROUND(AVG(reads_data_per_sec_mb), 2) AS avg_reads_per_sec_mb,
ROUND(AVG(writes_mb), 2) AS avg_writes_mb,
ROUND(AVG(writes_reqs_per_sec), 2) AS avg_writes_reqs,
ROUND(AVG(writes_data_per_sec_mb), 2) AS avg_writes_per_sec_mb,
NULL::numeric AS avg_waits,
NULL::numeric AS avg_time_ms
FROM awr_iostat_filetype
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != ''
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
AND dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
AND filetype_name NOT ILIKE 'TOTAL%'    GROUP BY filetype_name
),
combined AS (
SELECT * FROM fn
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM ft
)
SELECT *
FROM combined
ORDER BY (avg_reads_mb + avg_writes_mb) DESC
LIMIT 10;
